description: Automatically replace text fragments with symbols or different text

manifest.name: Substitutions

name: Substitutions

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Filter substitution records in the settings

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.6.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

You can now filter your substitutions inside the settings! (closes #14)
RegEx validation messages have also been improved. (closes #15)

## What's Changed
* Run npm audit fix and add it to the release checklist by @Copilot in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/19
* Add repository-level Copilot coding-agent instructions by @Copilot in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/16
* Show regex format errors in UI tooltip and provide valid regex placeholder by @Copilot in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/17
* Add searchable filtering for substitution records in Settings by @Copilot in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/20
* Release/0.6.0 by @BambusControl in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/21

## New Contributors
* @Copilot made their first contribution in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/19

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/compare/0.5.0...0.6.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Regular Expressions in Substitutions

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.5.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Now you can use Regular Expressions to define smarter substitutions using advanced patterns instead of only plain text fragments.
Also fixed an issue where save data was misbehaving when substitutions were added through a command.

## What's Changed
* fix: new substitution-records created via modal no longer disappear by @BambusControl in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/11
* Regular Expressions & Versioned Save Data by @BambusControl in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/12
* Release/0.5.0 by @BambusControl in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/13


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/compare/0.4.2...0.5.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fix: Buggy Substitutions

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.4.2%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Fixed unwanted substitutions after cursor movement where typing `1/` then changing the cursor position by mouse or arrow keys and typing `2` after, would replace 3 characters in the new position with `½` because the state of the plugin wasn't updated on cursor movement.

## What's Changed
* Fix unwanted substitutions by @BambusControl in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/9
* Release/0.4.2 by @BambusControl in https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/pull/10

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/BambusControl/obsidian-substitutions/compare/0.4.1...0.4.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fix

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.4.1%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Fixed a bug with swapping `from` and `to` in substitution settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Escape Characters

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.4.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Added the ability to handle escape sequences in text substitutions (like \n for newline), implementing a new swap button to easily interchange "from" and "to" values, cleaning up unnecessary code files, and improving the substitution record UI

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/308c7215-2948-481f-8cee-bb5b40a04e68)

Addresses #2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fix

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.3.1%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Fixed a bug where removing a character using <kbd>backspace</kbd> would incorrectly update the editor state resulting in incorrect subtitutions.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Add substitution command

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.3.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

Added a command `Add Substitution` which allows you to add a new substitution while you edit text directly!

### Changes

- Added a command `Add Substitution`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Fixed Substitution Saving & Dynamic Reloading

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.2.0%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

You can now update your substitutions and immediately use them without reloading Obsidian!
Also, creating multiple new substitutions at once should now be saved.

### Changes

- Fixed saving of multiple new substitutions
- Removed duplicated substitution of `<--`
- Updated packages with audit fixes
- Updated Readme

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes 🐞

![Obsidian Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?label=version%20downloads&query=%24%5B%22substitutions%22%5D%5B%220.1.2%22%5D&url=https%3A%2F%2Fraw.githubusercontent.com%2Fobsidianmd%2Fobsidian-releases%2Fmaster%2Fcommunity-plugin-stats.json&logo=obsidian&color=8b6cef&logoColor=8b6cef&labelColor=f1f2f3&logoWidth=15&style=flat-square)

- Fixed error when reverting substitutions with backspace would duplicate source text after substituted text
- Added more substitutions by default
